Dr. Ali-Reza Etemadieh brings his extensive dental expertise to Orange County Dental Care, which he established in 2013. Born in Iran and raised in Germany, Dr. Etemadieh chose dentistry after a personal dental experience changed his career path from medicine to dentistry. He's committed to providing the highest quality dental care in a warm, welcoming environment where every patient is treated like family.
Discover how Dr. Etemadieh and our multilingual team can transform your smile with personalized, quality-focused care. Book your visit today!

At Orange County Dental Care, we prioritize quality above all else. Dr. Etemadieh is the dentist that other dentists trust with their own care. We never compromise on integrity, materials, or service—ensuring that every patient receives the highest standard of dental treatment available.

Visit us at our convenient Orange or Tustin location. Our modern practices feature the latest dental technology including digital x-rays and intraoral scanners to ensure accurate diagnoses and comfortable treatments. We welcome patients of all ages and proudly offer care in multiple languages.
Experience the Orange County Dental Care difference where quality meets compassion. Our dedicated team is ready to provide you with exceptional dental care tailored to your unique needs.

headings.text: Preventative Dental Care in Orange County
Protect Your Smile with Preventative Care

paragraphs: 665 N Tustin St suite w, Orange, CA 92867, United States
665 N Tustin St suite w, Orange, CA 92867, United States

At Orange County Dental Care, we believe that preventative care is the foundation of excellent oral health. Our comprehensive preventative services help you maintain a healthy smile and avoid costly treatments down the road. From thorough cleanings to early detection of potential issues, we focus on preserving your natural teeth and preventing problems before they start.

Our preventative care includes professional cleanings, comprehensive exams, digital x-rays, oral cancer screenings, fluoride treatments, and periodontal care. These services work together to remove plaque and tartar, detect early signs of decay or disease, and strengthen your teeth against future damage. We customize your preventative care schedule based on your unique needs.

Regular preventative care offers numerous benefits beyond just avoiding cavities. It helps maintain fresh breath, prevents gum disease, reduces the risk of tooth loss, saves money on extensive treatments, and contributes to better overall health. Research has shown connections between oral health and conditions like heart disease and diabetes.
The comprehensive care I receive at Orange County Dental Care has kept my smile healthy for years. Their attention to detail during cleanings is outstanding!

During your preventative visit at Orange County Dental Care, our hygienist will thoroughly clean your teeth, removing plaque and tartar that can't be addressed with regular brushing and flossing. Dr. Etemadieh will then conduct a comprehensive examination, checking for signs of decay, gum disease, oral cancer, and other potential concerns. Digital x-rays may be taken to detect issues not visible to the naked eye.

Based on your examination, we'll develop a personalized preventative care plan that may include recommendations for at-home care, professional cleaning frequency, and any additional treatments to address specific concerns. Our goal is to help you maintain optimal oral health through regular care and early intervention when necessary.

Don't wait until problems develop—maintain your healthy smile with regular preventative care at Orange County Dental Care. Our comprehensive approach helps keep your teeth and gums in optimal condition.
Built by Energize Group

mainEntity.name: How often should I have a dental cleaning?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most patients benefit from cleanings every six months, but those with gum disease or certain health conditions may need more frequent visits. Dr. Etemadieh will recommend the optimal schedule for your needs.

mainEntity.name: Are dental x-rays safe?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. At Orange County Dental Care, we use digital x-rays that emit up to 90% less radiation than traditional film x-rays. We only take x-rays when necessary for proper diagnosis and treatment planning.

mainEntity.name: What is an oral cancer screening?

acceptedAnswer.text: It's a quick, painless examination where Dr. Etemadieh checks your mouth, lips, tongue, and throat for early signs of oral cancer. Early detection significantly improves treatment outcomes.

mainEntity.name: How can I prevent gum disease?

acceptedAnswer.text: Regular professional cleanings, proper brushing and flossing, a healthy diet, avoiding tobacco, and prompt treatment of early symptoms are key to preventing gum disease.

mainEntity.name: What causes tooth decay?

acceptedAnswer.text: Tooth decay results from bacteria in your mouth producing acids that erode tooth enamel. Factors include poor oral hygiene, frequent snacking, sugary foods and drinks, and insufficient fluoride exposure.

pages.metaDescription: Restore your smile with our comprehensive restorative dental treatments in Orange, CA. We offer fillings, crowns, bridges, and root canals.

headings.text: Restorative Dental Care in Orange County
Restore Your Smile's Health and Beauty

paragraphs: 665 N Tustin St suite w, Orange, CA 92867, United States
665 N Tustin St suite w, Orange, CA 92867, United States

Damage to your teeth doesn't have to be permanent. At Orange County Dental Care, our restorative dental services rebuild, repair, and renew teeth that have been affected by decay, injury, or wear. Using premium materials and advanced techniques, Dr. Etemadieh provides restorative treatments that not only return function to your teeth but also enhance their appearance and longevity.

We offer a comprehensive range of restorative treatments including tooth-colored fillings, crowns made of zirconia or gold, bridges, inlays and onlays, root canal therapy, and full mouth rehabilitation. For every procedure, we use only the highest quality materials—avoiding amalgam in favor of more aesthetic and biocompatible options. Each restoration is precisely crafted to match your natural teeth.

Restorative dentistry does more than just repair damage—it restores your ability to eat, speak, and smile with confidence. By addressing issues promptly, we can prevent further deterioration and more complex problems. Our restorative treatments are designed to be durable and natural-looking, preserving as much of your natural tooth structure as possible.
"After years of dental problems, Dr. Etemadieh restored my smile completely. I can eat anything now, and my teeth look completely natural!"

The restorative process begins with a thorough examination to assess your dental needs. Dr. Etemadieh will discuss your treatment options, taking into account factors such as the extent of damage, your aesthetic goals, and your long-term oral health. We use digital scanning technology to ensure precise measurements and perfect fit for all restorations, whether it's a simple filling or a complete crown.

Most restorative procedures can be completed in just one or two visits, with every attention paid to your comfort throughout. For more extensive restorations, we'll create a comprehensive treatment plan that addresses your needs in the most efficient sequence. After your restoration is complete, we'll provide guidance on how to care for your new dental work to ensure its longevity.
Don't let damaged teeth affect your quality of life. At Orange County Dental Care, we can restore your smile's function and appearance with high-quality, long-lasting restorations.
Built by Energize Group

mainEntity.name: How long do dental crowns last?

acceptedAnswer.text: With proper care, high-quality crowns like those we provide at Orange County Dental Care can last 15 years or more. Regular check-ups help ensure their continued performance and fit.

mainEntity.name: Are tooth-colored fillings as durable as metal ones?

acceptedAnswer.text: Today's composite fillings are highly durable while being more aesthetic and conservative than traditional amalgam fillings. They bond directly to your tooth, providing excellent support.

mainEntity.name: Is root canal treatment painful?

acceptedAnswer.text: Modern root canal therapy is comparable to having a filling placed. We ensure you're completely comfortable during the procedure, and most patients experience significant pain relief afterward.

mainEntity.name: How do I know if I need a crown instead of a filling?

acceptedAnswer.text: Crowns are typically recommended when a tooth has extensive damage, has had root canal treatment, or needs significant reinforcement. Dr. Etemadieh will explain why a particular restoration is best for your situation.

mainEntity.name: What are inlays and onlays?

acceptedAnswer.text: These are custom-made restorations that fit within (inlay) or over (onlay) the cusps of your teeth. They're more conservative than crowns but stronger and more durable than fillings, ideal for moderately damaged teeth.

headings.text: Cosmetic Dental Treatments in Orange County

paragraphs: 665 N Tustin St suite w, Orange, CA 92867, United States
665 N Tustin St suite w, Orange, CA 92867, United States

Your smile creates lasting impressions. At Orange County Dental Care, our cosmetic dentistry services are designed to enhance the appearance of your teeth and create the smile you've always wanted. Dr. Etemadieh combines artistic vision with technical expertise to deliver beautiful, natural-looking results. From subtle improvements to dramatic transformations, we tailor our approach to your unique goals.

We offer a comprehensive range of cosmetic treatments including professional teeth whitening, porcelain veneers, chairside composite veneers, dental bonding and contouring, and Invisalign clear aligners. Each service is customized to address your specific concerns—whether that's discoloration, chips, gaps, misalignment, or a complete smile makeover. Our focus is always on creating results that look naturally beautiful.

The benefits of cosmetic dentistry extend far beyond appearance. A beautiful smile can boost your self-confidence, create positive first impressions, and even improve your overall oral health. Many of our cosmetic procedures not only enhance aesthetics but also strengthen teeth and improve function, offering both immediate and long-term advantages.
"I never used to smile in photos, but after my treatment with Dr. Etemadieh, I can't stop smiling! The results look so natural—just a better version of my own teeth."

Your cosmetic journey begins with a consultation where we discuss your goals and concerns. Dr. Etemadieh will evaluate your dental health and facial features to recommend the most suitable treatments for achieving your desired results. We may use digital imaging to show you what your new smile could look like before treatment begins, helping you make informed decisions about your care.

Treatment timelines vary based on the procedures selected. Some treatments, like whitening or bonding, can be completed in a single visit, while others, such as Invisalign or multiple veneers, may take several weeks or months. Throughout your treatment, we focus on preserving the health of your teeth while enhancing their appearance, ensuring results that not only look great but also contribute to your long-term oral health.

Discover how cosmetic dentistry at Orange County Dental Care can enhance your smile and boost your confidence. Dr. Etemadieh's artistic approach ensures beautiful, natural-looking results tailored to your unique features.

mainEntity.name: How long does teeth whitening last?

acceptedAnswer.text: Professional whitening results can last from several months to a year or more, depending on your habits. Avoiding staining foods and beverages and maintaining good oral hygiene can extend the results.

mainEntity.name: Are veneers permanent?

acceptedAnswer.text: Porcelain veneers require a small amount of enamel removal, making them a permanent commitment. However, they're designed to last 10-15 years or longer with proper care.

mainEntity.name: Can Invisalign fix all types of misalignment?

acceptedAnswer.text: Invisalign can address many common alignment issues, though very complex cases may require traditional orthodontics. Dr. Etemadieh will evaluate whether you're a good candidate during your consultation.

mainEntity.name: Will my cosmetic dental work look natural?

acceptedAnswer.text: Absolutely. Dr. Etemadieh takes great care to ensure that all cosmetic work complements your natural features, including your face shape, skin tone, and existing teeth. Our goal is enhancement, not artificial perfection.

mainEntity.name: How much does cosmetic dentistry cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: Costs vary depending on the specific treatments and the extent of work needed. We provide detailed treatment plans with associated costs during your consultation and offer various payment options to make your smile goals achievable.

A properly aligned smile isn't just about aesthetics—it contributes to better oral health and function. At Orange County Dental Care, we offer comprehensive orthodontic solutions including Invisalign clear aligners to help patients of all ages achieve straighter, healthier smiles. Dr. Etemadieh combines advanced technology with personalized treatment plans to deliver excellent results with maximum comfort and convenience.

We provide a range of orthodontic treatment options with a focus on clear aligner therapy. Using advanced 3D digital scanning, Dr. Etemadieh creates precise treatment plans that map out the exact movements of your teeth, allowing you to see your virtual results before treatment begins. Our orthodontic solutions are designed to fit your lifestyle while effectively addressing alignment issues, spacing problems, and bite irregularities.

Today's orthodontic treatments offer significant advantages over traditional methods, with options that are more comfortable, convenient, and aesthetically pleasing. Properly aligned teeth are easier to clean, reducing the risk of decay and gum disease. Correcting bite issues can also alleviate jaw pain, improve speech, and enhance overall dental function. Most importantly, a straight smile can boost your confidence in personal and professional settings.
"My orthodontic treatment with Dr. Etemadieh transformed not just my smile but my confidence. The process was so much easier than I expected, and the results are amazing!"

Your orthodontic journey begins with a comprehensive evaluation where Dr. Etemadieh assesses your teeth, jaw, and overall oral health. Using our advanced intraoral scanner, we create precise digital models of your teeth that serve as the foundation for your personalized treatment plan. For Invisalign patients, this technology allows us to show you a preview of your expected results and create aligners that fit perfectly for optimal tooth movement and comfort.

Treatment duration varies based on individual needs, with most patients completing their orthodontic therapy within 12-24 months. If you choose Invisalign, you'll receive a series of custom aligners that you'll wear for 20-22 hours daily, changing to a new set approximately every 1-2 weeks. You'll visit our office every 6-8 weeks for progress checks. After completing treatment, you'll wear a retainer to maintain your new smile. Throughout the process, our team provides support and guidance to ensure successful outcomes.

Experience the confidence that comes with a beautifully aligned smile. At Orange County Dental Care, our orthodontic solutions offer an effective path to straighter teeth with options designed for your comfort and lifestyle.

mainEntity.name: Am I too old for orthodontic treatment?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, there's no age limit for orthodontic treatment. Many of our patients are adults who decide to improve their smile later in life. Modern options like clear aligners make treatment more appealing for adult professionals.

mainEntity.name: How long will my orthodontic treatment take?

acceptedAnswer.text: Treatment time varies based on the complexity of your case. Minor alignment issues may be corrected in as little as 6 months, while more complex cases typically take 18-24 months. Dr. Etemadieh will provide a more specific timeline during your consultation.

mainEntity.name: Will orthodontic treatment hurt?

acceptedAnswer.text: Patients typically experience mild pressure or discomfort for a few days after an adjustment or when switching to a new aligner. This temporary sensation is a sign that your treatment is working to move your teeth.

mainEntity.name: Can I play sports or musical instruments during orthodontic treatment?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Clear aligners can be removed temporarily for these activities if necessary, though we recommend wearing a mouthguard for contact sports regardless of your orthodontic treatment.

mainEntity.name: How do I care for my teeth during orthodontic treatment?

acceptedAnswer.text: Maintaining excellent oral hygiene is crucial during orthodontic treatment. With clear aligners, oral hygiene is easier as you can remove them for brushing and flossing. We'll provide detailed care instructions specific to your treatment.

Dental anxiety shouldn't prevent you from receiving the care your smile needs. At Orange County Dental Care, we understand that visiting the dentist can be stressful for many patients. That's why we offer referrals for sedation options to help you relax during your treatment. Our compassionate approach focuses on ensuring your comfort while providing the quality dental care you deserve in a stress-free environment.

While Orange County Dental Care doesn't offer direct sedation services, we work closely with trusted specialists who provide various sedation options for our patients who experience dental anxiety. We can coordinate referrals based on your specific needs and the complexity of your treatment. Our primary focus remains on creating a comfortable, supportive environment for all patients through compassionate care and clear communication about each procedure.

For patients with dental anxiety, sedation dentistry through our specialist partners offers numerous benefits. It allows necessary dental work to be completed comfortably, often with no memory of the procedure. This approach is also beneficial for patients requiring extensive treatment, those with a strong gag reflex, or individuals with special needs who may have difficulty remaining still during dental procedures.

"As someone who avoided the dentist for years due to anxiety, the sedation option Dr. Etemadieh coordinated completely changed my experience. I was able to get the dental care I needed without stress!"

If you experience dental anxiety, Dr. Etemadieh will discuss your concerns during your consultation and determine whether sedation might be beneficial for your treatment. Based on your medical history, anxiety level, and the complexity of your dental procedure, we can recommend the appropriate specialist for sedation services. Our team works closely with these specialists to ensure coordinated care and a seamless experience for our patients.

On the day of your procedure, the sedation will be administered by the specialist according to the predetermined plan. Throughout your treatment, your vital signs will be monitored to ensure your safety and comfort. After your procedure, you'll need a responsible adult to drive you home, and we'll provide detailed post-treatment instructions. Our team will follow up to ensure you're recovering well and address any questions or concerns you may have.

Dr. Etemadieh and the team at Orange County Dental Care are ready to provide you with exceptional dental care in a comfortable, welcoming environment. Whether you need a routine check-up or are considering a smile transformation, you'll benefit from his expertise and commitment to quality.
Built by Energize Group

mainEntity.name: Is sedation dentistry safe?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, when administered by qualified specialists, sedation dentistry is very safe. Prior to recommending any sedation option, we review your complete medical history to identify any potential risks or contraindications.

mainEntity.name: Will I be completely unconscious during my procedure?

acceptedAnswer.text: It depends on the type of sedation. With the most common forms of conscious sedation, you'll remain awake but deeply relaxed. With deeper sedation administered by specialists, you may have little to no memory of the procedure afterward.

mainEntity.name: How should I prepare for sedation dentistry?

acceptedAnswer.text: Preparation varies depending on the type of sedation. Generally, you should avoid eating or drinking for a certain period before your appointment, arrange for someone to drive you home afterward, and wear comfortable clothing. The specialist will provide detailed instructions.

mainEntity.name: What types of procedures might benefit from sedation?

acceptedAnswer.text: Sedation can be beneficial for various procedures, particularly those that are lengthy or complex. It's also helpful for patients with strong dental anxiety, regardless of the specific treatment needed.

mainEntity.name: Will my insurance cover sedation?

acceptedAnswer.text: Coverage varies by insurance provider and plan. Some plans cover sedation when it's deemed medically necessary, while others consider it an elective service. Our team can help you understand your coverage options before proceeding with treatment.

headings.text: Emergency Dental Care in Orange County

paragraphs: 665 N Tustin St suite w, Orange, CA 92867, United States

Dental emergencies can happen at any time, often causing significant pain and anxiety. At Orange County Dental Care, we provide prompt, effective emergency dental services to address your urgent needs and relieve your discomfort. Dr. Etemadieh makes emergency patients a priority, offering same-day appointments whenever possible and after-hours care when needed for serious situations.

We handle a full range of dental emergencies including severe toothaches, broken or chipped teeth, knocked-out teeth, lost fillings or crowns, dental abscesses, soft tissue injuries, and objects caught between teeth. Our focus is on relieving your pain quickly and addressing the underlying problem effectively. When you call with an emergency, our team will provide immediate guidance and arrange for you to be seen as soon as possible.

Seeking prompt professional care for dental emergencies not only provides immediate pain relief but also helps prevent more serious complications. Quick intervention can often save damaged teeth, prevent infection, and reduce the need for more extensive treatment later. Our emergency care focuses on both addressing the immediate concern and developing a plan for long-term dental health.
"When my crown fell off during dinner, Orange County Dental Care saw me first thing the next morning. Dr. Etemadieh fixed it quickly and painlessly—I couldn't be more grateful!"

When you arrive for an emergency appointment, our first priority is alleviating your pain and assessing the extent of the problem. Dr. Etemadieh will perform a focused examination, which may include digital x-rays to evaluate damage that isn't visible to the naked eye. Based on this assessment, he'll explain your treatment options and recommend the most appropriate course of action to address both immediate needs and any underlying issues.

Treatment varies based on the specific emergency but might include procedures such as reattaching a knocked-out tooth, placing a temporary or permanent restoration, draining an abscess, or prescribing medication for infection or pain. In some cases, we may provide temporary treatment to stabilize your condition, followed by a more permanent solution at a subsequent appointment. Throughout the process, we ensure you're comfortable and informed about your care.
Dental emergencies require prompt attention for the best outcomes. We're committed to providing the urgent care you need to resolve your emergency and protect your oral health.
Built by Energize Group

mainEntity.name: What should I do if my tooth gets knocked out?

acceptedAnswer.text: Pick up the tooth by the crown (not the root), rinse it gently without scrubbing, and if possible, place it back in the socket. If that's not possible, keep it in milk or saliva and call us immediately. Time is critical—teeth have the best chance of being saved if treated within an hour.

mainEntity.name: How quickly can I be seen for a dental emergency?

acceptedAnswer.text: We make every effort to see emergency patients the same day they call, and Dr. Etemadieh provides after-hours care for severe emergencies. When you call, our team will assess your situation and schedule you accordingly.

mainEntity.name: What can I do for a toothache before my appointment?

acceptedAnswer.text: Rinse your mouth with warm saltwater, take over-the-counter pain medication as directed (avoid placing aspirin directly on the gum), use dental floss to remove any trapped food, and apply a cold compress if there's swelling. These measures may provide temporary relief until you can be seen.

mainEntity.name: Is a chipped tooth considered an emergency?

acceptedAnswer.text: It depends on the severity. Minor chips might not require immediate attention, but larger breaks can expose the inner tooth to bacteria and cause pain. We recommend calling our office to describe the situation so we can determine the urgency.

mainEntity.name: What if I have a dental emergency while traveling?

acceptedAnswer.text: Call our office for guidance—we can often provide advice to help manage the situation until you return. For severe emergencies requiring immediate attention, we can help direct you to appropriate care in your location.

headings.text: Dental Implant Solutions in Orange County

paragraphs: 665 N Tustin St suite w, Orange, CA 92867, United States
665 N Tustin St suite w, Orange, CA 92867, United States

Dental implants represent the gold standard in tooth replacement technology. At Orange County Dental Care, Dr. Etemadieh provides premium implant solutions that look, feel, and function just like natural teeth. Using only high-quality American-made Straumann and Swiss-made Hoissen implants, we deliver results that stand the test of time. Our extensive implant training and attention to detail ensure successful outcomes that restore both function and aesthetics.

We offer comprehensive implant services including single tooth implants, multiple tooth replacement, and implant-supported dentures. Each implant is carefully placed to integrate with your jaw bone, creating a stable foundation for your new tooth. We use only premium titanium implants and custom-designed crowns that blend seamlessly with your natural teeth, ensuring both functionality and natural appearance.

Unlike traditional tooth replacement options, dental implants replace both the root and crown of missing teeth. This complete replacement prevents bone loss, maintains facial structure, and provides unmatched stability and function. Implants don't require modification of adjacent teeth, are easy to maintain, and with proper care, can last a lifetime—making them a superior long-term investment in your oral health.
"My dental implant has completely changed my life. I can eat anything, and nobody can tell it's not my natural tooth. Dr. Etemadieh's work is truly exceptional."

The implant process begins with a comprehensive evaluation including digital imaging to assess bone quality and determine optimal implant placement. If needed, preparatory procedures such as bone grafting may be recommended to ensure a strong foundation. The implant placement surgery is precisely planned, and Dr. Etemadieh uses gentle techniques to minimize discomfort. Most patients report that the procedure is much easier than they anticipated.

After placement, the implant requires a healing period of several months during which it integrates with your jawbone—a process called osseointegration. Once fully integrated, we place a custom-designed crown that matches your natural teeth. Throughout the process, we ensure your comfort and provide temporary solutions so you're never without teeth. With proper care and regular check-ups, your implant can provide decades of reliable function.

Don't let missing teeth affect your quality of life. Experience the permanent solution that dental implants provide at Orange County Dental Care. Our premium implants restore both function and appearance for a natural-looking, long-lasting result.

mainEntity.name: Am I a candidate for dental implants?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most adults with good general health are candidates for implants. Dr. Etemadieh will evaluate factors such as bone density, gum health, and medical history to determine if implants are right for you.

mainEntity.name: How long does the implant process take?

acceptedAnswer.text: The complete process typically takes 3-6 months, depending on your specific situation and whether preparatory procedures are needed. The majority of this time is for healing and osseointegration.

mainEntity.name: Are dental implants painful?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most patients experience minimal discomfort during and after implant placement. We provide appropriate pain management, and many patients return to work the day after the procedure.

mainEntity.name: How do I care for dental implants?

acceptedAnswer.text: Implants require the same care as natural teeth—regular brushing, flossing, and professional cleanings. With proper maintenance, they can last a lifetime.

mainEntity.name: Why choose premium implants like Straumann or Hoissen?

acceptedAnswer.text: Premium implants offer superior design, materials, and long-term success rates. Dr. Etemadieh chooses these brands for their documented clinical success and reliability, ensuring the best possible outcome for your investment.

pages.metaDescription: Get custom dentures at Orange County Dental Care in Orange, CA. We create comfortable, natural-looking full and partial dentures to restore your smile.

headings.text: Custom Denture Solutions in Orange County

paragraphs: 665 N Tustin St suite w, Orange, CA 92867, United States
665 N Tustin St suite w, Orange, CA 92867, United States

Missing teeth can significantly impact your quality of life, affecting everything from your diet to your self-confidence. At Orange County Dental Care, we provide custom-crafted denture solutions that restore your ability to eat, speak, and smile with confidence. Our dentures are designed for optimal fit, function, and natural appearance, giving you back the complete smile you deserve.

We offer a variety of denture solutions including full dentures to replace all teeth, partial dentures to fill gaps while preserving healthy teeth, and implant-supported dentures for maximum stability. Each prosthetic is custom-designed to complement your facial features and provide the most natural look possible. We use high-quality materials that balance durability with comfort and aesthetics.

Today's dentures are far superior to those of the past, offering improved comfort, aesthetics, and function. Our custom-fitted dentures restore your ability to eat a varied diet, speak clearly, and smile confidently. They also help maintain facial structure, prevent shifting of remaining teeth, and provide a cost-effective solution for multiple missing teeth.
"My new dentures from Dr. Etemadieh have completely transformed how I feel about myself. They're comfortable, look natural, and I can eat all my favorite foods again!"

The denture process begins with a comprehensive evaluation of your oral health and discussion of your goals and preferences. We take precise measurements and impressions to ensure your dentures will fit perfectly and function optimally. If you have remaining teeth that need extraction, we'll create a treatment plan that minimizes any period without teeth. Throughout the process, we focus on creating dentures that complement your facial features and personal preferences.

Once your custom dentures are fabricated, we carefully check the fit and make any necessary adjustments to ensure comfort and function. We provide detailed instructions on caring for your new dentures and schedule follow-up appointments to address any concerns. As your mouth naturally changes over time, we offer ongoing support and maintenance to keep your dentures fitting well and functioning properly for years to come.

Don't let missing teeth hold you back from enjoying life to the fullest. At Orange County Dental Care, our custom denture solutions can restore your smile's appearance and function with comfortable, natural-looking results.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to get used to new dentures?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most patients adjust to new dentures within a few weeks. Initially, you may experience increased saliva flow, some soreness, and changes in speech, but these issues typically resolve as you adapt to your new teeth.

mainEntity.name: How long do dentures last?

acceptedAnswer.text: With proper care, dentures typically last 5-7 years before needing replacement. Regular check-ups allow us to make adjustments and ensure optimal fit as your mouth naturally changes over time.

mainEntity.name: Can I sleep in my dentures?

acceptedAnswer.text: We generally recommend removing dentures at night to give your gum tissues time to rest and to properly clean your dentures. Dr. Etemadieh will provide specific guidance based on your situation.

mainEntity.name: Will dentures change how I speak?

acceptedAnswer.text: You may notice some changes in speech initially, but most patients adapt quickly. Reading aloud during the adjustment period can help you become accustomed to speaking with your new dentures.

mainEntity.name: Are implant-supported dentures better than traditional dentures?

acceptedAnswer.text: Implant-supported dentures offer superior stability and prevent bone loss, but they require surgery and a higher initial investment. During your consultation, we'll help you determine which option best suits your needs and preferences.
